gaps: No existing test case covers language switching functionality.
No existing test case verifies that selecting Spanish displays Spanish text (not Portuguese) on the welcome screen.
No existing test case covers the Settings > Language selection flow at all.
No existing test case validates locale-specific string mappings for any language.
The bug scenario involves a localization/internationalization feature which is entirely untested in the current test suite.

generated_testcases.title: Verify Settings > Language menu is accessible
steps: Locate the Language option in the Settings menu
generated_testcases.expected: The Language option is visible and tappable in the Settings screen.

generated_testcases.title: Verify selecting Spanish language displays Spanish text on welcome screen
steps: Confirm the language change if prompted
generated_testcases.expected: The welcome screen displays text in Spanish (e.g., 'Bienvenido' or equivalent Spanish greeting), not Portuguese.

generated_testcases.title: Verify selecting Portuguese language displays Portuguese text on welcome screen
steps: Confirm the language change if prompted
generated_testcases.expected: The welcome screen displays text in Portuguese (e.g., 'Bem-vindo' or equivalent Portuguese greeting).

generated_testcases.title: Verify switching from Spanish to English reverts welcome screen to English
steps: Return to welcome screen and verify Spanish text is shown
Confirm the language change if prompted
generated_testcases.expected: The welcome screen displays text in English after switching back from Spanish.

generated_testcases.title: Verify Spanish and Portuguese welcome texts are distinct and not mixed
steps: Return to welcome screen and capture the welcome text
Return to welcome screen and capture the welcome text
generated_testcases.expected: The Spanish welcome text (e.g., 'Bienvenido') is different from the Portuguese welcome text (e.g., 'Bem-vindo'). No mixing or overlap of languages occurs.

generated_testcases.title: Verify all UI strings on welcome screen are in Spanish when Spanish is selected
steps: Inspect all visible text labels, buttons, and headings on the screen
generated_testcases.expected: All UI elements on the welcome screen display text in Spanish. No English or Portuguese strings are visible.

generated_testcases.title: Verify language selection persists after app restart
steps: Return to welcome screen and verify Spanish text is shown
generated_testcases.expected: The welcome screen still displays text in Spanish after the app is restarted, confirming the language preference is persisted.

generated_testcases.title: Verify default language is English on first launch
steps: Clear app data or install the application fresh
Launch the application for the first time
generated_testcases.expected: The welcome screen displays text in English by default before any language selection is made.
